## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track (91 published, 10 new articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Performance dip noted; refresh content showing positive impact](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Need to investigate drop in rankings for high-converting keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Refining methodology for identifying and prioritizing key content/keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Considering shift to pillar content approach for certain clusters](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [91 articles published; hit 10 articles/week target](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [12 articles ready for review, 8 in legal review](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Started optimizing old, underperforming articles (meta tags, descriptions)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Cannibalization analysis in progress (manual process, assigning primary keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [Slight uptick in overall performance, likely due to refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [New content still in indexing phase](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Added share of voice metric to tracking](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Jessica to provide more comprehensive competitor list for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

### Keyword Performance Concerns

  - [Drop noted in rankings for high-converting keywords (positions 1-10)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team to investigate cause and develop action plan](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Prateek suggested deep dive analysis on landing page level:](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Leads generated over time](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Visitor numbers (historical vs. current)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [Conversion attribution at page level](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Discussion on refining methodology for identifying key content/keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Kyle noted potential inaccuracies in SEMrush data; suggested prioritizing GSC data](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Recent Google algorithm update (2-2.5 weeks ago) may be impacting results](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Team to focus on maintaining/improving positions for high-converting keywords while expanding clusters](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### Enterprise Content Cluster

  - [Some back-and-forth on positioning for new enterprise topics (e.g., SMS compliance, WhatsApp communications)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Jessica suggested providing brief overviews for new topics to guide content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Sadira adjusted LLM settings based on feedback; should improve future outputs](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### CTA Banner Implementation

  - [Extended CTA banner with clickable image to blog pages (previously only on resource pages)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Content Structure Approach

  - [Discussing shift from current topic-based approach to pillar content structure](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Team to start with translation cluster (10+ articles, driving good traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Aim to create 30 articles per cluster, then double down on best performers](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Will analyze data to determine which clusters are ready for pillar approach](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Site-wide Content Audit

  - [Jessica to provide site-wide landing page traffic and conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Team to analyze performance across different content types (blog, resources, use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Will assess internal linking structure and potential content cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to provide updated competitor list for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Team to investigate drop in rankings for high-converting keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Jessica to share site-wide landing page traffic and conversion data for audit](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Implement CTA banner on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Begin shift towards pillar content approach, starting with translation cluster](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Sadira to apply adjusted LLM settings for improved enterprise content outputs](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance post-Google algorithm update](https://fathom.video/share/XNiYoayacCtF_NecfFzHqVCLGNfF-xx8?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
